arts.ttl: Arsenal can still make one signing after deadline day that will change everything for Mikel Arteta - opinion
arts.sum: Arsenal failing to deliver in the transfer market is becoming a worryingly regular event in north London, a situation which must be frustrating Mikel Arteta...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends Newcastle Carabao Cup semi-final Arsenal warning
arts.sum: With Newcastle at home in the second leg, Eddie Howe's men will be considered favourites to advance to the Wembley final where the winners will face either Liverpool or Tottenham Hotspur but Arteta still has faith his men can overturn the two-goal deficit to advance. Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta insists his team have not given up hope of reaching the final of the Carabao Cup despite the odds being stacked against them heading into the return leg at Newcastle United .

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Newcastle, deadline day disappointment, Havertz and team news
arts.sum: We haven't achieved it so we are disappointed in that sense but as well we are very aware that we only want to bring certain kind of players and we have to be very disciplined with that as well and I think that we will. There's been lots of talk about strikers but obviously when you've got players contributing goals from all over the pitch, that really, really does help.

arts.ttl: 'They just need': Gary Neville shares what Arsenal must now do to beat Liverpool to the title post-window
arts.sum: Arsenal remain six points behind Liverpool in the Premier League table and have a big job on their hands to get the better of the...

arts.ttl: I played in front of 100,000 fans in Tehran but Newcastle's semi-final will be something else
arts.sum: Shay Given admits that many Newcastle United fans are already looking forward to hearing the final whistle at St James' Park on Carabao Cup semi-final night. Given, like head coach Eddie Howe, has warned it is only half-time and after Arsenal's Gabriel Martinelli warned Arsenal are good enough to score up to five goals, the Gunners have not written this tie off yet.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright says Marcus Rashford now can’t afford to do what £50m player has done at Arsenal
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford was perhaps the biggest-name player to move in the January transfer window as the Manchester United ace joined Aston Villa on loan. Rashford...

arts.ttl: 'We haven't achieved' - Mikel Arteta reacts to Arsenal's transfer window inactivity
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta reveals his feelings towards Arsenal's complete lack of activity in the January transfer market.

arts.ttl: Myles Lewis-Skelly, Gabriel jibes at Erling Haaland "fair game" during Arsenal 5-1 Man City
arts.sum: Arsenal's mocking of Erling Haaland in Sunday's 5-1 Premier League win over Manchester City was "fair game", a former Gunners Premier League winner tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Why Mikel Arteta is unhappy ahead of Arsenal's clash with Newcastle as he delivers 'final' vow
arts.sum: "We had a clear intention… we have not achieved it," Arteta said in his press conference ahead of tomorrow night's Carabao Cup semi-final second leg. It left Arteta frustrated that he couldn't add to his ranks as Arsenal look to overturn a 2-0 first leg deficit against Newcastle at St James' Park on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta 'DISAPPOINTED' by Arsenal's lack of January transfer business
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has admitted that he is “disappointed” by the club’s failure to sign a new forward during the January transfer window. Mikel Arteta 'DISAPPOINTED' by Arsenal's lack of January transfer business
